data.name: dumbbell tate press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height.
Step:4 Rotate your wrists back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell tricep kickback with stork stance
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

data.name: dumbbell twisting bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face towards you at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then reverse the movement by pressing the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 As you press the dumbbells up, twist your wrists back to the starting position with palms facing away from you.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell upright row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell upright row (back pov)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell upright shoulder external rotation
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Rotate your arms externally, bringing the dumbbells up towards your head while keeping your elbows in the same position.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell w-press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell waiter biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell zottman curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbell zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad.
Step:2 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up.
Step:3 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dumbbells seated triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:4 Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dynamic chest stretch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly bring your arms forward, crossing them in front of your body.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 10-30 seconds.
Step:6 Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dynamic style band side triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the band with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out to the sides, keeping them parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Slowly bend your elbows and bring your hands towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms still.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arms back out to the starting position.
Step:5 (dynamic variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: dynamic style barbell lying back of the head tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows. Maintain dynamic form throughout.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: elbow dips
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge next to your hips.
Step:2 Slide your hips forward off the bench and straighten your legs, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your hands to straighten your arms and lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: elbow lift - reverse push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the ground with your legs extended and your hands placed directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and press through your palms to lift your upper body off the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Pause at the top for a moment, squeezing your upper back muscles.
Step:4 Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: elbow-to-knee
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body off the ground, bringing your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 At the same time, bring your left knee towards your right elbow, creating a twisting motion.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement, this time bringing your left elbow towards your right knee and your right knee towards your left elbow.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: elevator
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Place your hands on your hips or cross them in front of your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the waist, lowering your upper body towards the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly raise your upper body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: endurance style one arm dip
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body. Maintain endurance form throughout.
Step:3 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

data.name: exercise ball alternating arm ups
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball alternating arm ups with fast
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms extended down by your sides.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift one arm up towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow slightly bent. Perform with fast intensity.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement with the other arm.
Step:6 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball back extension with arms extended
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you, with your palms facing down.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight and your neck in line with your spine.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball back extension with hands behind head
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it with your hips resting on the ball.
Step:2 Position your feet against a wall or other stable surface for support.
Step:3 Cross your arms behind your head, with your hands touching the back of your head.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your hips.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball back extension with knees off ground
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and lie face down on top of it, with your hips resting on the ball and your feet against a wall for stability.
Step:2 Position your hands behind your head or crossed over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball back extension with rotation
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, extending your back until your body forms a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs stable.
Step:5 Return to the center and repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:6 Lower your upper body back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball dip
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ball beside your hips, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Engage your triceps and push through your hands to lift your body off the ball, straightening your arms.
Step:4 Lower your body back down by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball hip flexor stretch
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

data.name: exercise ball hip flexor stretch pointed
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat. Emphasize pointed control.

data.name: exercise ball hug
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the stability ball with both hands, hugging it close to your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lean back, keeping your back straight and your feet planted on the ground.
Step:4 Continue leaning back until you feel a stretch in your back muscles.
Step:5 Hold the position for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball lat stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up overhead.
Step:3 Slowly lean to the opposite side, feeling a stretch in your lat muscle.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

data.name: exercise ball lower back stretch (pyramid)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Slowly walk your feet forward, rolling the ball down your back until your lower back is resting on the ball.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, allowing your lower back to stretch over the ball.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball lying side lat stretch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your side with your legs extended and your head supported by the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your top arm on the ball for stability.
Step:3 Reach your top arm overhead and allow your torso to rotate slightly.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your lat muscles on the side of your body.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

data.name: exercise ball on the wall calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between ankles)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place an exercise ball between the wall and your lower back.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your ankles.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball on the wall calf raise (tennis ball between knees)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your back against a wall and place an exercise ball between your lower back and the wall.
Step:2 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly in front of you.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your arms extended by your sides.
Step:4 Place a tennis ball between your knees.
Step:5 Raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball one leg prone lower body rotation
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Step:4 Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the rotation with the other leg.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball one leg prone lower body rotation fierce
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on the stability ball with your hips resting on the ball and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground in front of you for support.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to stabilize your body.
Step:4 Slowly lift one leg off the ground, keeping it straight and parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Rotate your leg outward, away from your body, while keeping your hips and upper body stable.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return your leg to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the rotation with the other leg. Focus on fierce movement.
Step:8 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball one legged diagonal kick hamstring curl
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your back with your legs extended and your heels resting on top of the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your arms by your sides for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles to lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your shoulders to your heels.
Step:4 Bend your right knee and bring it towards your chest, keeping your left leg extended and your foot flexed.
Step:5 Kick your right leg diagonally across your body, extending it fully and engaging your hamstrings.
Step:6 Slowly return your right leg to the starting position, maintaining control and stability.
Step:7 Repeat the movement with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball pike push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands on the floor and your shins resting on the stability ball.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, rolling the ball towards your hands.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and your body in a pike position, forming an inverted V shape.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your upper body towards the floor, keeping your head in line with your hands.
Step:5 Push through your hands and extend your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball prone leg raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat with your legs extended and your toes resting on top of the stability ball.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground, shoulder-width apart, and engage your core muscles.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, slowly lift them off the ground, using your lower back and glutes to raise them as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball seated hamstring stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you.
Step:3 Place your hands on your hips for support.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted.
Step:5 Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your heels and using your hamstrings to pull yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: exercise ball seated triceps stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.

data.name: exercise ball seated triceps stretch wide
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand and extend your arm straight up above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm close to your ear. Maintain wide form throughout.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm.

data.name: exercise ball supine triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: extended style inverted row
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with extended intensity.

data.name: ez bar french press on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball and hold an EZ barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez bar lying bent arms pullover
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your head at one end and your feet on the floor.
Step:2 Hold the EZ barbell with a pronated grip (palms facing away from you) and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell in an arc motion behind your head, maintaining the slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return the barbell to the starting position by reversing the arc motion.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez bar lying close grip triceps extension behind head
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing up, and extend your arms straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez bar reverse grip bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up, until your torso is almost parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pull the ez barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez bar seated close grip concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold an EZ barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez bar standing french press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell anti gravity press
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell close grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell close grip preacher curl - precision variation
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize precision control.

data.name: ez barbell close-grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Exhale as you curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell decline close grip face press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell decline close grip face press - mini variation
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Lower the barbell towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then press the barbell back up to the starting position. Emphasize mini control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell decline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell incline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell jm bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell reverse grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell reverse grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell seated curls
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the ez barbell to hang down in front of you.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the ez barbell upwards towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the ez barbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell seated triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez barbell spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez-bar biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping them stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows close to your body, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez-bar close-grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with a close grip, hands shoulder-width apart, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Slowly lower the barbell towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: ez-barbell standing wide grip biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: farmers walk
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your shoulders back.
Step:3 Take small, controlled steps forward, maintaining an upright posture.
Step:4 Continue walking for the desired distance or time.
Step:5 To finish, stop walking and carefully lower the dumbbells to your sides.

data.name: fast band straight leg deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and place the band around your feet.
Step:2 Hold the band with both hands, palms facing your body, and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Engage your core and maintain a slight bend in your knees.
Step:4 Slowly hinge forward at your hips, keeping your back straight and chest lifted.
Step:5 Lower the band towards the ground while keeping your legs straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your glutes and hamstrings to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions. Perform with fast intensity.

data.name: fast style resistance band seated hip abduction
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a chair or bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on the sides of the chair or bench for support.
Step:4 (fast variation) Engage your abductors (outer thigh muscles) and slowly push your knees apart, against the resistance of the band.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly bring your knees back together.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: fierce style forward lunge (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 (fierce variation) Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: fierce weighted straight bar dip
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 (fierce variation) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: finger curls
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your fingers towards your palms, squeezing the barbell tightly.
Step:4 Hold the contraction for a moment, then slowly release your fingers back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: firm style hanging oblique knee raise
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your knees towards your chest, twisting your torso to the side as you do so.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat on the other side, twisting your torso in the opposite direction.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions. Emphasize firm control.

data.name: flag
instructions: Step:1 Start by gripping a vertical pole with both hands, palms facing each other, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground, keeping them straight.
Step:3 Using your core and upper body strength, raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: flexible assisted prone hamstring
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a mat or bench with your legs fully extended.
Step:2 (flexible variation) Have a partner or use a resistance band to secure your ankles.
Step:3 Engage your hamstrings and lift your legs towards your glutes, keeping your knees straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: flexible cable triceps pushdown (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your triceps and exhale as you push the v-bar down until your arms are fully extended. Perform with flexible intensity.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your triceps.
Step:7 Inhale as you slowly return the v-bar to the starting position, maintaining control.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: flexion leg sit up (bent knee)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 At the same time, lift your legs off the ground, bending your knees and bringing them towards your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: flexion leg sit up (straight arm)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and arms straight above your head.
Step:2 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground while simultaneously lifting your legs towards your chest.
Step:3 Reach your hands towards your toes as you lift your upper body and legs.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body and legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: floor fly (with barbell)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until your arms are parallel to the floor, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: fluid dumbbell step-up lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your sides.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is on the surface.
Step:3 Push through your right heel and lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left foot up as well.
Step:4 (fluid variation) Once both feet are on the step, lower your left foot back down to the starting position, keeping your right foot on the step.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating which foot you step up with each time.
Step:6 Continue for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: flutter kicks
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your legs extended and your hands by your sides.
Step:2 Engage your core and lift your legs off the ground about 6 inches.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, alternate lifting one leg slightly higher than the other.
Step:4 Continue this fluttering motion for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: forward jump
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position.
Step:3 Swing your arms back for momentum.
Step:4 Jump forward explosively, extending your hips, knees, and ankles.
Step:5 Land softly on the balls of your feet and immediately go into the next jump.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: forward lunge (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: forward lunge (male) with bench
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position. Focus on bench movement.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: frankenstein squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell in front of your body with straight arms.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight, lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: frog crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: frog planche
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 As you lower your body, lift your feet off the ground and bring your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Hold this position for a few seconds, then extend your legs back out and push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: front lever
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Step:3 Bend your knees and tuck them towards your chest.
Step:4 Simultaneously, lift your legs up and extend them straight out in front of you, keeping your body parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for a full front lever position.
Step:6 To release, slowly lower your legs back down and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: front lever reps
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Step:3 Keeping your body straight, lift your legs up until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, aiming for 10-20 seconds.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: front plank with twist
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:2 Engage your core and glutes to maintain a stable position.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the right, lifting your right arm and extending it towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Keep your hips and legs stable as you twist.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the twist on the left side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: full maltese
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended straight out to the sides.
Step:2 Slowly lean forward, keeping your arms straight, until your upper body is parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Engage your core and hold this position for a few seconds.
Step:4 Return to the starting position by pushing through your feet and standing back up.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: full planche
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Engage your core and slowly shift your weight forward, lifting your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Continue shifting your weight forward until your body is parallel to the ground, balancing on your hands.
Step:4 Hold this position for as long as you can, maintaining a straight body line.
Step:5 Slowly lower your feet back to the ground and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: full planche push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands placed slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body down towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, lean your body forward and lift your feet off the ground, balancing on your hands.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground.
Step:5 Push through your hands and extend your arms to lift your body back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Maintain a straight line from your head to your heels throughout the movement.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: gentle prone twist on stability ball
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on a stability ball with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes touching the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core muscles and slowly lift your upper body off the ball, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Rotate your torso to one side, bringing your shoulder towards your hip. Keep your hips and legs stable throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 (gentle variation) Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: gentle style cable pulldown (pro lat bar)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Maintain gentle form throughout.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

data.name: gentle style dumbbell one leg fly on exercise ball
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an exercise ball with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Place one foot on the ground and extend the other leg straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly and bring your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells down and out to the sides, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 (gentle variation) Pause for a moment at the bottom, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
